I2C driver and hardware abstraction layer for STM32F7, with data structures, functions, and error handling.


## Files
- **[i2c.c](i2c.c.md)**: I2C driver implementation for STM32F7, including bus configuration, data transfer, and error handling.
- **[i2c_definitions.h](i2c_definitions.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for I2C communication, including transfer events and bus state.
- **[i2c_hal.c](i2c_hal.c.md)**: I2C hardware abstraction layer for STM32F7, including initialization, transfer management, and IRQ handling.
- **[i2c_hal.h](i2c_hal.h.md)**: I2C hardware abstraction layer functions for initializing, enabling, disabling, and managing transfers.
- **[i2c_hal_definitions.h](i2c_hal_definitions.h.md)**: Defines I2C hardware abstraction layer structures and interrupt handlers for event and error management.
